query_title: Rurouni Kenshin Part II: Kyoto Inferno

recommendations.title: Rurouni Kenshin Part I: Origins
recommendations.overview: In 1868, after the Bakumatsu war ends, the ex-assassin Kenshin Himura traverses Japan with an inverted sword, to defend the needy without killing.

recommendations.title: Rurouni Kenshin Part III: The Legend Ends
recommendations.overview: Shishio sets sail in his ironclad ship to bring down the government. In order to stop him, Kenshin trains with his old master to learn his final technique.

recommendations.title: Rurouni Kenshin: The Final
recommendations.overview: In 1879, Kenshin and his allies face their strongest enemy yet: his former brother-in-law Enishi Yukishiro and his minions, who've vowed their revenge.

recommendations.title: Rurouni Kenshin: The Beginning
recommendations.overview: Before he was a protector, Kenshin was a fearsome assassin known as Battosai. But when he meets gentle Tomoe Yukishiro, a beautiful young woman who carries a huge burden in her heart, his life will change forever.

recommendations.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
recommendations.overview: After arriving in India, Indiana Jones is asked by a desperate village to find a mystical stone. He agrees – and stumbles upon a secret cult plotting a terrible plan in the catacombs of an ancient palace.

recommendations.title: Outlaws - For Greater Glory
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the Cristeros War (1926-1929), which was touched off by a rebellion against the Mexican government's attempt to secularize the country.

recommendations.title: Ninja Scroll
recommendations.overview: Jubei is a masterless ninja who travels the land alone, lending his services to those with gold—or a worthy cause. His fearsome abilities have served him well, but a plot to overthrow the government threatens to end his wandering ways—and possibly hi

recommendations.title: House of Flying Daggers
recommendations.overview: In 9th century China, a corrupt government wages war against a rebel army called the Flying Daggers. A romantic warrior breaks a beautiful rebel out of prison to help her rejoin her fellows, but things are not what they seem.

recommendations.title: Blade of the 47 Ronin
recommendations.overview: A new class of warriors emerges among the Samurai clans to keep a sought-after sword from falling into the wrong hands.

recommendations.title: Godzilla: Tokyo S.O.S.
recommendations.overview: Mothra and her fairies return to Japan to warn mankind that they must return Kiryu to the sea, for the dead must not be disturbed. However Godzilla has survived to menace Japan leaving Kiryu as the nation's only defense.
